column1: Hey Leona, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi! We are in between dates right now, we want to go when it will be the most poppin. What dates (5 nights total) would you recommend going during mid March?

Perffff good to know. Everything is very up in the air right now but I'm trying to get my girls to agree to Cabo instead of Cancun. I heard Cabo is a bit nicer and has more stuff to do but costs a bit more than cancun
If you'd be able to give me a bit of a comparison between the two (prices, activities, experiences, etc..) that would be great!
Cabo is def nicer but its a little more on the pricey side
how many ppl in your group so far?
i think it'll be 4 of us but not 100% yet
thats solid! which school you all from?
we'll be coming from all over. do we all have to be current students?
Nah it's all good I'll still hook it up. As long as you all have the same spring break week you're good
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
lit ur the best. in a perfect world id like to have this booked by the end of next week but it rlly depends on my friends
Aight cool yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. Let's you secure things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of it through email? It's a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
i got it! what clubs does the party pass get us into?
Squid Roe, Mandala, La Vaquita, and the open bar Booze Cruise
would you say cabo is still really lit like cancun during spring break?
yea honestly just as lit! its just a little more expensive than Cancun
ok! are there any four person rooms available at riu santa fe?
max occupancy for rooms at the santa fe is 3 ppl
do you think it would be possible for us to get two rooms right next to each other?
next to eachother we can guarantee all depends on what the hotel has available based on their check in and check outs at the time you arrive
during check in you can ask them for rooms close to eachother, on the same floor, or in the same building. but they handle the physical room assignment at check in
ok amigo sorry for all the back and forth, just trying to accommodate everyone! does Riu Cancun allow 4 per room?
I can find out about that in the am if thats cool. but usually nah
I can get you pricing too
hey Leona sorry for the delay, but unfortunately the Riu Cancun doesn't have any 4 person options for rooms currently
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
hi!! i have a call with my friends tonight, i'll hit you up tomorrow when i have a better idea what we're going with:)
can you send me quote for Riu cancun?
also we are now looking at going 19th-24th
hi! please let me know if you could send over this info, thanks so much
hi! mustve missed your text over night, apologies
its lookin like I have to wait til the am to get the Riu Cancun pricing. our ops team is currently offline
please let me know when you can send those over
Two person room $1235 per person. three person room $1125 per person
Yup! All inclusive, transportation from the airport and back included as well

Hi!! So we are currently looking to book two rooms, tandem if possible, at Riu Santa Fe Cabo from March 19-24th 2026. We were wondering if you had those dates available and if we would be able to buy the party package during our stay or if we have to buy it while booking
I'll confirm first thing in the morning!
green light! gonna email you the reservation in a sec
you can get the party package during your stay, wanna do that?
sweet! lmk when you send it over. we would get the package during our stay in that case then yes
okay bet. yea ill email it over in a sec
hey just re emailed over your reservation wanted to make sure you got it
would it be possible to only buy the party package, or is only included when you book a room
you can do the party pass separately yea
how much is a party pass per person and what would it include? thanks so much for your help by the way
hey morning. party pass comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at the off resort nightclub hosted events. the venues are Squid Roe, Mandala, Vaquita, and our open bar Booze Cruise
theres a bundle deal for $275 for all 4 events. you can also get them individually
you can add these on your package any time before your trip. did you plan on securing the reservation?
hey Leona, did you still need this reservation?
hi, we dont need to book a room but we are still interested in booking activities through you guys
hey all good! Did you end up booking it through the resort?
can we book some activities through you guys still?
yea 100%, we looking to add the party package?
we really just want to have access to mango deck and maybe one nightclub and go on a booze cruise

hey sorry was waiting on operations, i can get you situated with the cruise and and nightclub night or two, but for mango deck you'll have to get that separately, its ran by a different team so we actually dont offer it
sounds good! yea how much would it be per person to go on a booze cruise and a nightclub?
booze cruise is $79, and the main nightclub squid roe is $75. comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar

ok! we are definitely interested in booking a booze cruise. we'd be wanting to go sunday march 22nd and there's 3 of us. how much would that be after taxes and fees? also, would we go in a group to squid roe or with a guide?
we're trying to get everything booked right now so lmk when you can :)
hey! sorry I missed your text over night

so for squid roe we'll have a staff member there at the venue, but ultimately you'd be shuttling over there with other groups that traveled with us, and then you'll use your party pass ticket to get in and get your open bar, etc
for the booze cruise, its $79 flat, no additional taxes and fees. just lmk if we want to set up both the booze cruise + squid roe, or just the cruise
also the day of your cruise will be assigned based on the days the cruise is available. I dont have the final sched just yet, but theres typically two days to chose from each week
okay great info thank you so much, i'll text my friends and i'll let you know by the end of the day (im in hawaii sorry for time difference)
i think we might be interested in both though!
and no worries text me any time, ill answer soon as I can
hey! we are down to book the booze cruise and a night at squid roe
we'll be in cabo at the riu santa fe from march 19th-24th
and would we be able to go out friday or saturday for squid roe?
hey! sorry I missed your text yesterday

I'll get the booze cruise and squid roe link set up for you in a few! you can typically go whichever days are available, but based on what other events they have going on they may have some days blocked off
I would keep in mind too, that since its spring break a lot of ppl tend to travel in and out on the weekends. so sometimes the weekdays are the most lit downtown
here's the link for you all to secure the party pass https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/package/BNGWWFN22W
ok great thank you! there's only three of us now btw
Okay all good. I'll remove that last slot you 3 can still hop in on the other ones
hey! i was wondering when we'll find out what days we are going on the boat and squid roe?
should i have gotten an email?
Hey squid roe is avail every night! And the booze cruise date will be assigned to you during check in with the party pass staff

hello, we are at the resort we checked in yesterday but yesterday and today we have not been able to find any team member with go blue tours and we’ve asked around and they said he’s not here today and we were wondering when we can check in and get our party pass?
we don't want to miss our cruise
I just reached out to get deets on what time they'll be back
So I have Alex's number who is the rep on site that will get you all situated
